---
title: Formula Sheet
description: Core formulas for review.
---

## Algebra

::: {.formula-box}
Line: `y = mx + b`
:::

## Calculus

::: {.formula-box}
Power rule: `d/dx x^n = n*x^(n-1)`
:::

::: {.formula-box}
Definite integral: accumulated signed area.
:::

## Probability

::: {.formula-box}
Conditional probability: `P(A | B) = P(A and B) / P(B)`
:::

## Statistics

::: {.formula-box}
z-score: `(value - mean) / standard_deviation`
:::
